vocab.meaning: kích thích trí tuệ, gợi suy nghĩ
vocab.example: I find modern art to be more intellectually provocative as it challenges my preconceived notions of reality.

vocab.meaning: sự cảm thụ về mặt thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: Traditional art focuses more on aesthetic appreciation through meticulous attention to detail and realism.
Contemporary artists often use installations to convey complex abstract concepts that are difficult to put into words.

vocab.meaning: tay nghề thủ công tinh xảo
vocab.example: The reason I admire traditional oil paintings is the exquisite craftsmanship that went into every brushstroke.

vocab.meaning: tiên phong, mới lạ và phá cách
vocab.example: Although I respect the classics, I have always been drawn to the avant-garde movements of the 20th century.
The vibrant colors in impressionist pieces never fail to evoke a sense of nostalgia and warmth.

vocab.meaning: những ẩn dụ về mặt thị giác
vocab.example: Modern art is filled with visual metaphors that require the viewer to look beyond the surface level.
Traditional art is arguably superior because these masterpieces have stood the test of time for centuries.
Many modern artworks serve as powerful social commentary on issues like climate change or consumerism.

vocab.meaning: một sự tương phản rõ rệt
vocab.example: The minimalist style of modern galleries stands in stark contrast to the ornate frames found in traditional museums.
